trigger: After the codex-router root discovery fix and VCPChat restart, the user resent the /codex-router UI command.

validatedPrerequisites.summary: Default router root resolves to A:/codex-router and policy loading succeeds with policyVersion 2026-04-23.desktop-first.v1.1.
VCPChat recognizes /codex-router and /codex-task prefixes and calls window.codexRouterHostClient.run(task).
VCPChat distributed server was moved to port 15974.

interpretation: The UI toast is emitted only after the renderer command path receives a non-error response from window.codexRouterHostClient.run(task). This confirms the explicit VCPChat Codex Router command path is live and the earlier A:/VCP/codex-router policy path error is fixed.

externalArtifactsObserved.reason: The current renderer implementation stores the last result in window.__lastCodexRouterHostRun and shows a toast; it does not persist the UI command result to disk by default.

acceptance.desktopRemoteHttpCodexRouterHostPath: not_validated; HTTP DesktopRemote normalizer still rejects CodexRouterHost separately

nextRecommendedGate: Add optional audit/evidence persistence for UI Codex Router command results, or extend the DesktopRemote HTTP normalizer to accept CodexRouterHost if HTTP-based acceptance is required.
